title: Parser accepts invalid CREATE TRIGGER syntax
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION invalid_trigger_function() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN PERFORM * FROM non_existent_table;
key_bug_features: Invalid CREATE TRIGGER syntax accepted by parser
